session_summary: Shipped two features and deployed twice. Stripped slide preview to clean outline view, added delivery brief coaching card.

completed_this_session.what_was_done: Closed out. PR #14 was already merged from previous session. Branch deleted, status set to done.

Full implementation from plan through PR merge. Added delivery brief card to slide preview — structured coaching cheat sheet with overview, audience hook, power moment, and closing guide. Includes collapsible animation (duration-500 ease-in-out) and staggered reveal (brief fades in first, slides 1.2s later). PR #15 merged.

Stripped all decorative CSS from slide preview (geometric shapes, gradients, window chrome, concentric rings). Removed ThemePicker component and theme/accent state — preview is now a clean outline view. Also added global cursor:pointer for all interactive elements.

deployments: Deployed after TASK-021 close + preview simplification
next_task_context: The Google Slides export currently produces plain white slides with default text. TASK-023 adds visual styling via the Google Slides API (updateTextStyle, updateShapeProperties, updateParagraphStyle) so exported decks look polished — colored title slide background, proper font sizing, monospace code blocks, styled metrics. Server-side only change in src/server/lib/googleSlides.ts. Needs plan approval from Beckham before implementation.

TASK-024.title: Earlier slide generation during Brainstorm phase
TASK-024.notes: Lowest priority of the three. Highest prompt engineering risk — needs careful wording so early slides feel helpful, not half-baked.

key_decisions_this_session: Slide preview stripped to clean outline — design happens in Google Slides, not in-app
ThemePicker and theme/accent system removed entirely
Delivery brief framed as a 'cheat sheet for delivery' not a critique — no weakest section or suggestions, instead: overview, opening hook, power moment, closing guide
Staggered reveal: brief appears first, slides fade in 1.2s later on stream completion
dead_code_to_clean_up: src/client/lib/slideExport.ts — old HTML export, replaced by Google Slides
